# DesignOps Studio

> Product design, design systems, and 0–1 Figma builds on retainer for teams that ship.

DesignOps Studio is a product design consultancy led by Jacob Olenick. The site covers services, selected work, pricing tiers (Starter, Growth, Fractional Lead), and how retainer engagements run from kickoff to handoff.

## Main

- [Home](https://designops.studio/): Landing page — hero, clients, work, process, services, pricing, and founder bio
- [How we work](https://designops.studio/#process): Five-step process from Figma handoff through design sprint, async comms, sign-off, and file delivery
- [Selected work](https://designops.studio/#work): Portfolio including Espresso UI, Orgspace, CRTSIDE, AXS Inventory, and Visual App
- [What we offer](https://designops.studio/#services): 0→1 design systems in Figma, Claude Code integration, and embedded product design
- [Pricing](https://designops.studio/#pricing): Monthly retainer tiers at $2,750 (Starter), $3,500 (Growth), and $5,000–6,000 (Fractional Lead)
- [About the founder](https://designops.studio/#about): Jacob Olenick — Founder of DesignOps Studio & Espresso UI
- [Contact](https://designops.studio/#contact): Footer CTA and links to hire on Contra

## Optional

- [Hire on Contra](https://contra.com/jacobolenick): Book Jacob Olenick for product design and design systems work
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/jacobmolenick): Jacob Olenick on LinkedIn
- [Threads](https://www.threads.net/@jacob.olenick): Jacob Olenick on Threads
- [X](https://x.com/urdesignfriend): Jacob Olenick on X
